text.title: 30 Day Post Launch Review Template Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying 30 Day Post Launch Review Template. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: pull-funnel-snapshot
step.action: Pull per-channel funnel counts at T+30.

step.name: verdict-hypotheses
step.action: Per hypothesis: assign verdict + evidence URL.

step.name: draft-next-bets
step.action: Generate ≥3 next-bet candidates ranked by expected MRR delta.

step.name: attach-budgets
step.action: Allocate USD + hours per bet within total budget cap.

decision-gate.p: After step 4, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
